Protecting Lives, Serving Humanity, Preserving Compassion

A registered charitable Panjrapole in Sirohi, Rajasthan — devoted to the lifelong protection, care, and service of 900+ abandoned and helpless animals.

“Compassion towards living beings is the highest form of religion and humanity.”
— Our Guiding Principle
What We Do

Comprehensive Care for Every Animal

From the moment an animal arrives, we commit to their complete wellbeing — body, spirit, and soul.

Safe Shelter

We provide a permanent, clean, and safe home for abandoned, injured, and elderly cows who have nowhere to go.

Medical Care

Our in-house veterinary team provides round-the-clock treatment, surgery, and rehabilitation for all animals.

Daily Nourishment

Every animal receives freshly prepared nutritious feed and clean water — because no creature should go hungry.

Gau-Seva & Yagna

Regular religious ceremonies, gau-poojan rituals, and community service events rooted in our ancient values.

1993Established
Our Story

A Sanctuary Built on Faith & Seva

Founded over three decades ago in the spirit of Ahimsa, Suri Prem Jiv Raksha Kendra Sansthan has grown into one of the region’s most trusted gaushalas — a place where every cow, calf, and injured animal finds refuge.

We operate on the belief that caring for animals — especially the sacred cow — is a divine act. Through your support, we continue this timeless mission every single day.

Free medical treatment & surgery Permanent shelter for abandoned cattle Community-driven gau seva programs
Our Impact

Thousands of Lives Saved,
One by One

Every month, we rescue, treat, and rehabilitate scores of animals that have been hit by vehicles, abandoned, or left malnourished. Your donation directly funds the medicine, food, and staff that make this possible.

900+

Rescue Radius

Cost to Animals
Rescue & Rehab
Medical Care
Emergency Response Active

When Accidents Happen… We Respond

With the rapid expansion of four-lane roads and highways in nearby areas, animal accidents are increasing every day. In such critical moments, our Panjrapole Ambulance Service operates actively, providing immediate rescue, emergency medical aid, and life-saving care to injured animals.

Very often, your donation becomes the difference between life and death for a voiceless being.

100 km

Moments of Care & Compassion

Testimonials

What People Say About Us

Hear from our donors, visitors, and supporters who have witnessed our mission firsthand.

The work being done at Suri Prem Jiv Raksha Kendra is truly inspiring. Every animal is treated with dignity and love. It gives me immense peace to know my contributions are making a real difference in these innocent lives.
RS
Rajesh Shah
Regular Donor, Mumbai
I visited the Panjrapole with my family and was deeply moved by the level of care and dedication. The volunteers treat every cow like their own. This is what true seva looks like. We will continue to support this noble cause.
PJ
Priya Jain
Visitor & Donor, Ahmedabad
As a member of VAPS Mandal since the early days, watching this dream grow from 7 members to 218 and sheltering over 900 animals fills my heart with gratitude. This is what faith and collective service can achieve.
DM
Deepak Mehta
Founding Member, VAPS Mandal
The ambulance service is a lifesaver — literally. When a cow was hit on the highway near our village, the team arrived within the hour. That kind of dedication is rare. I donate monthly and encourage everyone to do the same.
SK
Suresh Kumar
Monthly Donor, Sirohi
